email-identification.title: Hey there! 👋
email-identification.subtitle: Enter your email to get started.

phone-identification.title: Let's verify your identity! 😊
phone-identification.subtitle: Enter your phone number to proceed.

phone-input.label: Phone number
phone-input.error: Phone number cannot be empty or is invalid

confirm-and-authorize.title: Confirm & Authorize
confirm-and-authorize.subtitle: {{tenantName}} will be able to securely view the following data:

qr-register.title: Liveness check
qr-register.subtitle: We need to verify that you're a real person
qr-register.instructions: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your mobile device and we'll use biometrics to verify it

qr-code.instructions: Make sure the QR code is clearly visible on your device's screen. When authenticated, this page automatically updates

sms.instructions: Alternatively, we can send you a link to your phone and you can continue from there

new-tab-requested.title: New browser window
new-tab-requested.subtitle: To continue, we need to open a new browser window. Please tap the button below

new-tab-processing.title: Liveness check pending
new-tab-processing.subtitle: We opened a new browser tab on this device. Please complete your liveness check in there

tenant-invalid.title: Integration incorrectly configured
tenant-invalid.subtitle: It seems like the Verify with Footprint integration is using an invalid integration key. Please contact the owner of this website

basic-information.title: Basic Data
basic-information.subtitle: We're legally required to collect this information

first-name.label: First name
first-name.error: First name cannot be empty or is invalid

last-name.label: Last name
last-name.error: Last name cannot be empty or is invalid

dob.label: Date of Birth
dob.error: Date of birth cannot be empty or is invalid

residential-address.title: What's your residential address?
residential-address.subtitle: We're legally required to collect this information.

ssn.title: What's your Social Security Number?
ssn.subtitle: We're legally required to collect this information.

security.title: Military-grade security
security.description: Your SSN is encrypted & stored in a secure environment.

privacy.title: Even Footprint can't see your data
privacy.description: Your SSN will only be accessed in Footprint if required by law, and you will be made aware each time.

credit-score.title: Your credit score won't change
credit-score.description: We use your SSN to verify your identity, not to run a credit check.

ssn.label: Social Security Number (SSN)
ssn.error: SSN cannot be empty or is invalid

body.view-on-my-footprint: You can view your personal data and the companies that have access to it on my.footprint.com.
body.one-click: Next time, you can just sign in using Footprint with one-click!
